'''babufu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:headchair|headchair]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-b-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:headchair|headchair]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| babufu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæbifith|bæbifith]] || [[word:bæbifij|bæbifij]] || [[word:bæbifish|bæbifish]] || [[word:bæbifi|bæbifi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:babubufuth|babubufuth]] || [[word:babubufuj|babubufuj]] || [[word:babubufush|babubufush]] || [[word:babubufu|babubufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:babufuth|babufuth]] || [[word:babufuj|babufuj]] || [[word:babufush|babufush]] || [[word:babufu|babufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:babuffuth|babuffuth]] || [[word:babuffuj|babuffuj]] || [[word:babuffush|babuffush]] || [[word:babuffuf|babuffuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:babufuthu|babufuthu]] || [[word:babufuju|babufuju]] || [[word:babufushu|babufushu]] || [[word:babufuku|babufuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:babufuth|babufuth]] || [[word:babufuj|babufuj]] || [[word:babufush|babufush]] || [[word:babufu|babufu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:babufuthul|babufuthul]] || [[word:babufujul|babufujul]] || [[word:babufushul|babufushul]] || [[word:babufukul|babufukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:babufuthuthu|babufuthuthu]] || [[word:babufujuju|babufujuju]] || [[word:babufushushu|babufushushu]] || [[word:babufuku|babufuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:babufuthun|babufuthun]] || [[word:babufujun|babufujun]] || [[word:babufushun|babufushun]] || [[word:babufukun|babufukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:babufuthuoro|babufuthuoro]] || [[word:babufujuoro|babufujuoro]] || [[word:babufushuoro|babufushuoro]] || [[word:babufukuoro|babufukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
